productDisplayName: Clarks Women Shavi Knot Leather Brown Heels
description: Take feminine dressing to a new level with these Shavi Knot sandals from clarks. The knotted bronze strap detailing and the wedge heel gives it an added edge. Team it with dainty skirts and tops for a very girly look. Upper Leather uppers comprised of knotted straps covering forefoot and extending along midfoot to encircle the ankle Metallic colour finish for added style Ankle strap with buckle closure for a snug Fit Midsole Lushly cushioned footbed with engraved paisley design for absolute comfort Outsole Wedge heel for added style with cork Textured rubber outsole with paisley engraved design on the forefoot for better grip shoe care Use a branded leather polish to keep your shoes shining Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth or brush to remove dust Do not machine wash or use a drier Do not store in direct sunlight
